title: Oleko Dundich
writer: Antonije Isakovic, Mikhail Kats, Leonid Lukov
actors: Branko Plesa, Tatyana Piletskaya, Stojan 'Stole' Arandjelovic
plot: Life and times of Aleksa Dundic, a volunteer in the Serb army during WW1, who later became a legend by fighting for the Red Army in the Russian Civil War.
